explanation: The LTL property captures the requirement that whenever the system is supported and sensor data is good, in the next time step the autopilot must be in the TRANSITION state, provided that it is currently in the PULLUP state.  The LTL property utilizes template ID 31, which expresses the implication of two boolean expressions (bool_exp1 and bool_exp3). bool_exp1 represents the condition that the system is supported and sensor data is good, while bool_exp3 represents the condition that the autopilot will be in the TRANSITION state in the next time step. The property is thus expressed as "Whenever bool_exp1 is true, then bool_exp3 must also be true in the next time step."
